block_03:
It's sad to admit, but we've noticed a decrease in your activity with IQ Option Affiliate program lately 😔. We would greatly appreciate you taking the time to answer a few short questions. This will help us understand what we’re doing wrong and to provide a higher quality service in the future — and maybe win you back.
As a thank you for your time and feedback, we will do the money giveaway for the survey participants. One winner randomly selected on August 15th will get a $100 prize to the wallet linked to their affiliate account. Don't miss the opportunity!
block_04: The survey will take no more than 3 minutes to complete.
block_06: Your feedback is important to us. Thanks for helping us get better 🙏
